questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain how the widespread use of solar panels will decrease the negative externalities of consumption caused by the use of kerosene lamps (paragraph [5]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The horizontal axis can be labelled output/quantity OR Q. The vertical axis can be labelled cost/benefit OR price/P. A title is not necessary.
